name: Ascenso a la sierra de Els Plans — Circular por La Sagra
region_intro: Mountain biking around Alcoi offers diverse terrain within the Alicante province, characterized by mountainous landscapes and significant natural parks. The region features the Prebetic mountain range, including the Sierra de Mariola Natural Park with its high peaks and extensive trails, and the Carrascal de la Font Roja Natural Park known for its dense Mediterranean forests. Rivers like the Vinalopó and Serpis originate here, contributing to varied natural features and elevation changes suitable for mountain biking. The area provides a network of routes ranging from easy greenways to challenging singletracks. Best mountain bike trails around Alcoi The most popular mountain bike trail is Parque Natural de la Serra de Mariola — Circular desde Alcoy por El Carrascalet, a 33.5 miles (54.0 km) trail that takes 5 hours 10 minutes to complete. This difficult route explores the Sierra de Mariola Natural Park, known for its biodiversity and panoramic views. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Ascenso a la sierra de Els Plans — Circular por La Sagra, a moderate 15.6 miles (25.2 km) path. This route features a significant ascent, offering views of the surrounding landscape. Local mountain bikers also love the L'Estepar Tunnel – L'Estepar Rest Area loop from Alcoi, a 18.3 miles (29.5 km) trail leading through varied terrain, often completed in about 2 hours 24 minutes. Mountain biking around Alcoi is defined by mountainous terrain, dense Mediterranean forests, and natural springs. The network offers options for different ability levels, from easy greenways to challenging climbs. The routes in Alcoi are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.7 stars from over 360 reviews. More than 1800 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Alcoi's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails around Alcoi?
A: The Alcoi region offers diverse terrain, from mountainous landscapes within the Prebetic mountain range to dense Mediterranean forests. You'll find a mix of easy greenways, moderate singletracks, and challenging routes with significant elevation changes. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e925069422/parque-natural-de-la-serra-de-mariola-circular-desde-alcoy-por-el-carrascalet" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Parque Natural de la Serra de Mariola — Circular desde Alcoy por El Carrascalet&lt;/a&gt;, for example, explores the Sierra de Mariola Natural Park, known for its biodiversity and panoramic views.

Q: Are there mountain bike trails suitable for beginners or families in Alcoi?
A: Yes, Alcoi offers options for all skill levels. The Vía Verde de Alcoi (Greenway of Alcoi) is a 21.7 km long cycling path that follows an old railway line, featuring tunnels and viaducts. It's generally considered an easy route, perfect for families and beginners. While not explicitly listed in the top routes, it's a well-known and accessible option in the area.

Q: What natural features or landmarks can I see while mountain biking in Alcoi?
A: The trails often weave through the Sierra de Mariola and Carrascal de la Font Roja Natural Parks, offering views of natural springs and dense Mediterranean forests. You might also encounter unique geological formations like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4611508" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cova de les Finestres&lt;/a&gt; or the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4752696" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;El Canyo Ice Well&lt;/a&gt;. The Vía Verde de Alcoi itself features ten tunnels and three viaducts, providing a unique experience.

Q: Are there any routes with particularly good viewpoints?
A: Many routes in the Sierra de Mariola Natural Park offer breathtaking panoramic views, especially from higher elevations. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e927456094/ascenso-a-la-sierra-de-els-plans-circular-por-la-sagra" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ascenso a la sierra de Els Plans — Circular por La Sagra&lt;/a&gt; route, for instance, includes a significant ascent that provides expansive views of the surrounding landscape. Montcabrer, the highest peak in Sierra de Mariola, also offers rewarding vistas.

Q: Is there convenient parking available for mountain bikers in Alcoi?
A: Yes, many trailheads and popular cycling areas, especially around the Vía Verde, offer facilities including rest areas and bike parking. For specific routes, it's advisable to check the individual tour details on komoot for parking recommendations near the starting points.

Q: What is the best time of year for mountain biking in Alcoi?
A: The region experiences a Mediterranean climate. Spring and autumn generally offer the most pleasant conditions for mountain biking, with mild temperatures. Summers can be hot, especially at midday, so early morning or late afternoon rides are recommended. Winters are typically mild, making year-round cycling possible, though some higher elevation trails might be cooler.

Q: Are there any challenging mountain bike routes for experienced riders?
A: Absolutely. Alcoi is known for its challenging routes, particularly within the Sierra de Mariola Natural Park. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e925069422/parque-natural-de-la-serra-de-mariola-circular-desde-alcoy-por-el-carrascalet" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Parque Natural de la Serra de Mariola — Circular desde Alcoy por El Carrascalet&lt;/a&gt; is a difficult 54 km trail with over 1200 meters of elevation gain. Another demanding option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/33878775" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Don Pedro-Soterroni Trail – Cami del Xocolatero Trail loop from Alcoi&lt;/a&gt;, which is also rated difficult.

Q: Can I bring my dog on the mountain bike trails in Alcoi?
A: While many natural areas in Spain allow dogs on trails, it's always best to check specific regulations for the Sierra de Mariola and Carrascal de la Font Roja Natural Parks, as some core protected areas might have restrictions or require dogs to be on a leash to protect wildlife. Generally, dogs are welcome on most public paths and greenways.

Q: What do other mountain bikers enjoy the most about mountain biking in Alcoi?
A: The area is highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.7 stars from over 360 reviews. Reviewers often praise the diverse terrain, the stunning natural parks, and the variety of routes catering to different skill levels. The unique experience of the Vía Verde and the challenging climbs with rewarding views are frequently highlighted.

Q: Are there any circular mountain bike routes available?
A: Yes, many of the mountain bike routes around Alcoi are designed as loops. For example, the popular &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/33897131" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;L'Estepar Tunnel – L'Estepar Rest Area loop from Alcoi&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate 29.5 km trail. Another option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/19421383" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;L'Estepar Rest Area – Carrasqueta Pass loop from Alcoi / Alcoy&lt;/a&gt;, which is a moderate 41 km route.

Q: How many mountain bike trails are there in Alcoi?
A: There are over 70 mountain bike trails available around Alcoi on komoot, offering a wide range of experiences. This includes 2 easy routes, 23 moderate routes, and 52 difficult routes, ensuring options for every level of rider.
tips: Very entertaining and fun trail with little technical difficulty and quite loose stone terrain in sections. The path runs through a very picturesque setting and connects the greenway with the La Sagra cave.
Cave with rock art. Access is open to the public at pre-established times. The environment is very nice
The views from the top of Els Plans at 1,325 meters are simply amazing. It is reached from the town of Torremanzanas by a signposted path in good condition and without too much technical difficulty.
